verses.text: Ps 117 This psalm, the shortest in the Psalter, invites all . . . people of the earth to praise the Lord because of his unfailing love and enduring faithfulness. 117:1 Paul quotes this verse to show that Gentiles would eventually praise the God of Israel (Rom 15:11).
